RECOVER FROM APPELLANT GRAVES, ANNETTE $2,480.12 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,580.12, DEFENDENT MAY APPLY TO THE COURT UNDER CCP 116.620(B) TO PAY IN INSTALLMENTS. ANY SUCH APPLICATION MUST BE FILED WITHIN 30 DAYS OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS DOCUMENT. THE FINAL JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF SEP-03-2013.
